title: Pose Estimation Stack Evaluation

candidates.name: MediaPipe Holistic Landmarker
candidates.hand_accuracy_notes: ~80-90% for complex sign language handshapes. Struggles with self-occlusion.
candidates.face_detail: BEST — 478 points, dense mesh for eyebrows, mouth, eye gaze
candidates.slr_community: Dominant — de facto standard in sign language recognition research

candidates.name: DWPose (RTMPose-l)
candidates.hand_accuracy_notes: Higher than MediaPipe on COCO-WholeBody (AP 52-56 vs ~45-50)
candidates.face_detail: POOR — only 68 sparse landmarks, insufficient for NMF
candidates.verdict: CANDIDATE — Server-side refinement for difficult CMs

candidates.name: RTMPose WholeBody
candidates.verdict: WATCH — Future alternative if iOS deployment materializes

candidates.name: ViTPose++ WholeBody
candidates.hand_accuracy_notes: Highest 2D accuracy (AP 57-60 hands) but impractical for mobile
candidates.verdict: NOT SELECTED — Too large for mobile, poor face detail

candidates.name: SMPLer-X
candidates.hand_accuracy_notes: Richest representation — full 3D mesh captures spread, contact, flexion geometrically
candidates.slr_community: Very low — used for ground-truth generation
candidates.verdict: NOT SELECTED — Offline ground-truth annotation tool only

primary_realtime.role: On-device real-time pose estimation for iPad annotation tool
primary_realtime.deployment: MediaPipe Tasks iOS SDK with GPU/CoreML delegate
justification: Only production-ready iOS option with official SDK
478 face landmarks critical for NonManualSpec (eyebrows, mouth, head tilt)
33 body landmarks for 76-tabula LocationSpec anchor classification
21 hand landmarks provide MCP/PIP/DIP/TIP for FlexionLevel computation
15-20 MB total model — feasible for app bundle
25-30 fps on iPad — sufficient for PSHR phase capture
Dominant in SLR research — easier to benchmark and compare

secondary_server.role: Server-side refinement for difficult CMs when MediaPipe confidence is low
secondary_server.when: Phase 2 — when recorded video annotation pipeline is built

ground_truth.role: Offline 3D mesh annotation for training data quality assurance
ground_truth.when: Phase 2 — for building ML training datasets

known_gaps: Hand accuracy degrades under self-occlusion (fingers overlapping) — mitigate with temporal smoothing
Finger contact/spread not directly available from 21 keypoints — use geometric heuristics (implemented in hand_features.py)
Thumb opposition requires palm plane estimation — implemented via cross-product method
Some Cruz Aldrete CMs with subtle distinctions (e.g., CM#22 '"' vs CM#23 '°') may be hard to differentiate from keypoints alone

implementation_status.hand_feature_extraction: DONE — src/perception/hand_features.py (flexion→FlexionLevel, thumb opposition, spread, contact)
implementation_status.cm_matching: DONE — match_cm() in hand_features.py (matches against all 101 CMs)
implementation_status.video_benchmark: PENDING — needs LSM video test data
